replies.msg:
簡單啲嚟講，linear momentum 就同 net force有關，如果net force係0，咁linear momentum就係一個conserved quantity.

Angular momentum就同net torque有關，如果net torque 係0，咁angular momentum就會係一個conserved quantity. （rotational version of Newton's second law)

佢哋各自同唔同嘅physical quantity有關。

而Bohr model嗰度其中2個postulates包括

第一，啲electron只可以喺某啲orbit度郁。
第二，angular momentum只可以係nh/(2pi)，n = 1, 2, 3...

而呢第2個postulate 其實已經限制咗有咩value嘅angular momentum is allowed，呢個情況我哋會話angular momentum is quantized. 一個important consequence of quantization of angular momentum就係佢導致一個quantized嘅energy level，個derivation自己睇返書。本textbook應該有show比你睇點prove energy level of hydrogen atom，應該會用到L=mvr=nh/(2pi).

而quantization of energy level亦都解釋咗點解會有一個line spectrum，而唔係一個continuous spectrum. 因為energy level唔係continuous，而係quantized嘅，得某啲energy level is allowed. 所以得某啲energy 嘅light佢先absorb到，而呢個energy必須 = energy level嘅 difference in a hydrogen atom。
